headline: Dow Jones Futures Dive As Oil Surges To $110. Iran Names Khamenei's Son As Supreme Leader.
summary: Futures tumbled while U.S. crude oil prices soared. Iran named Khamenei's son as its new Supreme Leader.

headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire
summary: The U.S. ordered non-emergency government staff to leave Saudi Arabia as the widening Iran war rattled global markets.

raw.headline: U.S. orders staff to leave Saudi Arabia as war spreads; Iran rules out immediate ceasefire

headline: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Trading Due. Iran Names Khamenei's Son As Supreme Leader.
summary: Futures loom with oil prices in focus. Iran rejected cease-fire calls. President Trump said the Iran war is "popular" with his base.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Await Oil Prices' Next Move. Iran Picks New Supreme Leader.
summary: Dow Jones futures loom, awaiting oil prices next move, with Gulf nations cutting crude production. Iran reportedly has picked a new Supreme Leader..

headline: Iran continues to hit Gulf countries as Israeli strikes intensify; Tehran says new leader appointed
summary: Bahrain and the United Arab Emirates report more strikes on civilian targets as U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran continue.
